name: Saucy Fudge Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the whole wheat flour, all-purpose flour, baking powder, cocoa, and salt.
2. Add the granulated sugar and soy milk to the dry ingredients. Mix well until combined.
3. Fold in the mashed banana until just incorporated.
4. In another bowl, mix the brown sugar and cocoa together with hot water and rum extract (if using). Stir until the sugar is dissolved.
5. Pour the wet mixture over the batter and stir gently to combine.
6. Transfer the mixture to an 8-inch (20 cm) casserole or pan that has been sprayed with Pam.
7. Bake in a 350-degree oven for about 40 minutes, or until the batter has risen above the sauce and is firm to touch.
8. Sprinkle grapenuts over the top of the pudding once it has cooled slightly before serving.
